text: WS_URL pointed to DEMO endpoint — all price data was fake. Root cause of ALL phantom SLs, price drift, wrong fills. Always verify endpoints.
Race condition in MAX_POS check: 2 goroutines opened CRV simultaneously (175ct SHORT + 169ct LONG). Added re-check before order placement.
sync_loop recalculated SL from hardcoded sl_pct=0.02, moving SL closer and triggering immediate SL on restart. Never overwrite existing SL with hardcoded defaults.
ISP di Indonesia (Internet Positif) blocks OKX API. DNS hijacking redirects ws.okx.com → 36.86.63.185. Solution: DNS monkey-patch + WARP SOCKS5 proxy.
ADX 14 di crypto selalu 40-54 di kondisi normal. Threshold 25 permanently block semua entry. Raised to 40.
XAG WR 22% over 32 trades — strategy bb_tight tidak cocok. Flip ke reverse juga gagal. Disabled.
wr_audit.py bug: no rate limit delay (8 calls berturut → OKX 429) + counting all bills including fees (subType 3,4) instead of only closes (5,6). Fixed.
MSTR WR 14% (3W/18L) post-reverse, WR 5% pre-reverse. EMA triple strategy incompatible with MSTR. Disabled permanently.
R:R terlalu rendah (1:1.3) dengan WR 40% = barely breakeven. Raised TP dari 65% ke 75% range (Bot 1) dan 2% ke 3% (Bot 2). MIN_NET_RR raised 1.5 → 2.0.
